meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` != 'Closed' 
Or `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Cancelled' 
Or `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Resolved' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved') 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` IS NULL 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` IS NULL) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` AS 'C1',
SUM(`FB:History`.`Value`) AS 'C2'
FROM
`Data Visualization Definition` 
INNER JOIN (`FB:History` )
ON (`Data Visualization Definition`.`GUID` = `FB:History`.`Variable System ID`)
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Overdue_Incidents' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` > 'Service Target Warning') 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

)

panels.description: The total number of closed incidents which were within the Response and Resolution  SLM/SLA levels

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Percentage of SLA Met Incidents
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID` AS C1,
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00 AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00 AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service))
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`= 'Closed'
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000))
having SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved') THEN 1 END)*1 > 0

panels.title: SLA Met Incidents (%)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`Select Column Name` AS C1
FROM
`Select Form Name` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
AVG(DATEDIFF('day',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, CurrentDate())) AS C1
FROM `HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved' 
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

panels.description: The total number of incidents that were re-opened after being closed

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Percentage of Reopened Incidents
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Re-Opened Date` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)*1.00

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID` AS C1,
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Re-Opened Date` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)*1.00 AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Re-Opened Date` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/(COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved')) THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` END)*1.00) 
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service))
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`= 'Closed'
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000))
having COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved')) THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` END) > 0

panels.title: Re-open Incidents (%)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Incidents_Met_SLA' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('5', '7') THEN '1' END)) As MissedCount,
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('5', '7') THEN '1' END))*100/(COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) AS percentMet
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationUserFriendlyID`
)

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
having (COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) > 0
LIMIT 100000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Incidents_Met_SLA' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 9 THEN '1' END)) As Aproaching,
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 9 THEN '1' END))*100/(COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) AS percentMet
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationUserFriendlyID`
)

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
having (COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) > 0
LIMIT 100000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Incidents_Met_SLA' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(CASE WHEN (`SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` NOT IN ('5', '7','9','2') OR `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IS NULL) THEN '1' END)) As Ongoing, 
(COUNT(CASE WHEN (`SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` NOT IN ('5', '7','9','2') OR `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IS NULL) THEN '1' END))*100/(COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)))
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationInstanceID`
)

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
having (COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) > 0
LIMIT 100000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Incidents_Met_SLA' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 2 THEN '1' END)) AS StoppedClock,
(COUNT(CASE WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 2 THEN '1' END))*100/(COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) AS percentMet
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationUserFriendlyID`
)

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
having (COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))) > 0
LIMIT 100000

SELECT Priority_SLMType,
	'Met' AS Status,
	CASE WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Critical - Response'THEN critical_response_met_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'High - Response' THEN high_response_met_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Medium - Response' THEN medium_response_met_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Low - Response' THEN low_response_met_count/total_incident_count
	END AS 'per' FROM
	(
	SELECT 
	   (CASE
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' THEN 'Critical - Response'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' THEN 'High - Response'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' THEN 'Medium - Response'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' THEN 'Low - Response'
	   END) AS Priority_SLMType,
	   'Met' AS Status,
	   sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Met'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS critical_response_met_count,
		sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Met'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS high_response_met_count,
		   sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Met'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS medium_response_met_count,
		sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Met'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS low_response_met_count,
		COUNT((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))*1.00 AS 'total_incident_count'
	   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
	INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
	ON (
	   `HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationInstanceID`
	)
	WHERE `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('Met', 'Missed')
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Company` In ($AssignedSupportCompany))
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` In ($AssignedSupportOrg))
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
		  and ( (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%') OR
				(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High'     AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%') OR
				(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium'   AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%') OR
			    (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low'      AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%') 
			  )	
	GROUP by Priority_SLMType) AS T0
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT Priority_SLMType,
	'Missed' AS Status,
	CASE WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Critical - Response'THEN critical_response_missed_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'High - Response' THEN high_response_missed_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Medium - Response' THEN medium_response_missed_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Low - Response' THEN low_response_missed_count/total_incident_count
	END AS 'per' FROM
	(
	SELECT 
	   (CASE
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' THEN 'Critical - Response'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' THEN 'High - Response'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' THEN 'Medium - Response'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' THEN 'Low - Response'
	   END) AS Priority_SLMType,
	   'Missed' AS Status,
	   sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Missed'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS critical_response_missed_count,
		sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Missed'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS high_response_missed_count,
		   sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Missed'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS medium_response_missed_count,
		sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Missed'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS low_response_missed_count,
		COUNT((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))*1.00 AS 'total_incident_count'
	   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
	INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
	ON (
	   `HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationInstanceID`
	)
	WHERE `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('Met', 'Missed')
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Company` In ($AssignedSupportCompany))
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` In ($AssignedSupportOrg))
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
		  and ( (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%') OR
				(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High'     AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%') OR
				(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium'   AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%') OR
			    (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low'      AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Response%') 
			  )	
	GROUP by Priority_SLMType) AS T1

panels.title: Response SLA performance by Incident Priority

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT Priority_SLMType,
	'Met' AS Status,
	CASE WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Critical - Resolution'THEN critical_resolution_met_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'High - Resolution' THEN high_resolution_met_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Medium - Resolution' THEN medium_resolution_met_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Low - Resolution' THEN low_resolution_met_count/total_incident_count
	END AS 'per' FROM
	(
	SELECT 
	   (CASE
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' THEN 'Critical - Resolution'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' THEN 'High - Resolution'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' THEN 'Medium - Resolution'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' THEN 'Low - Resolution'
	   END) AS Priority_SLMType,
	   'Met' AS Status,
	   sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Met'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS critical_resolution_met_count,
		sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Met'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS high_resolution_met_count,
		   sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Met'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS medium_resolution_met_count,
		sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Met'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS low_resolution_met_count,
		COUNT((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))*1.00 AS 'total_incident_count'
	   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
	INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
	ON (
	   `HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationInstanceID`
	)
	WHERE `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('Met', 'Missed')
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Company` In ($AssignedSupportCompany))
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` In ($AssignedSupportOrg))
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
		  and ( (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%') OR
				(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High'     AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%') OR
				(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium'   AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%') OR
			    (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low'      AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%') 
			  )	
	GROUP by Priority_SLMType) AS T0
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT Priority_SLMType,
	'Missed' AS Status,
	CASE WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Critical - Resolution'THEN critical_resolution_missed_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'High - Resolution' THEN high_resolution_missed_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Medium - Resolution' THEN medium_resolution_missed_count/total_incident_count
		 WHEN Priority_SLMType = 'Low - Resolution' THEN low_resolution_missed_count/total_incident_count
	END AS 'per' FROM
	(
	SELECT 
	   (CASE
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' THEN 'Critical - Resolution'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' THEN 'High - Resolution'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' THEN 'Medium - Resolution'
		  WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low'
		  AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' THEN 'Low - Resolution'
	   END) AS Priority_SLMType,
	   'Missed' AS Status,
	   sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Missed'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS critical_resolution_missed_count,
		sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Missed'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS high_resolution_missed_count,
		   sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Missed'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS medium_resolution_missed_count,
		sum(CASE
		WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%' and `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 'Missed'
		THEN 1 else 0 END)*100.00 AS low_resolution_missed_count,
		COUNT((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`))*1.00 AS 'total_incident_count'
	   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
	INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
	ON (
	   `HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationInstanceID`
	)
	WHERE `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('Met', 'Missed')
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Company` In ($AssignedSupportCompany))
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` In ($AssignedSupportOrg))
		  and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
		  and ( (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Critical' AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%') OR
				(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'High'     AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%') OR
				(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Medium'   AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%') OR
			    (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` = 'Low'      AND `SLM:Measurement`.`GoalCategoryChar` LIKE '%Resolution%') 
			  )	
	GROUP by Priority_SLMType) AS T1

panels.title: Resolution SLA performance by Incident Priority

panels.description: Mean time to resolution of incidents within the selected set of filters

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Avg MTTR in days
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` AS C1,
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery: SELECT 1

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Avg MTTR in days
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END)

groupByField.selectionColumnName: Date -> HPD:Help Desk -> Last Resolved Date

meta.rawSql:
SELECT
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) AS __time__,
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS Avg_MTTR_in_days
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`)
ORDER BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ASC
 
LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery: SELECT 1

panels.title: MTTR Trend

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` Is not Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service)) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`= 'Closed'
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup
ORDER BY AssignedGroup
Limit 10

panels.title: MTTR by support groups

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS C2,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS C3
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` != Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
COUNT(1) AS numberofinc,
CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved' THEN 'Open' ELSE  'Resolved' END as status
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup, status
ORDER BY AssignedGroup, status

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'Entry_ID',
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` AS 'time'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS Created,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OpenInc,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`='Critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Critical,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Resolved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Resolved,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Re-Opened Date`!= null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Reopened,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Closed,
Date(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) AS __time__
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`)
Order By Date(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) ASC

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS C2,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS C3
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` != Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
COUNT(1) AS numberofinc
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved')
and DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 7 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 14
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup
ORDER BY numberofinc desc
LIMIT 10

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` IS NOT NULL THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS Assignee,
COUNT(1) AS closed_count
FROM `HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`= 'Closed'
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY Assignee
ORDER BY closed_count desc
Limit 10

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` IS NOT NULL THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS Assignee,
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS CF1
FROM `HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`= 'Closed'

panels.title: MTTR by agent (Assignee)

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
AVG(DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate())) AS AverageAge
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
LIMIT 100000

SELECT DISTINCT
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Incident Number` AS `Incident Number`,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Description` AS C2,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Critical' THEN 'P1 - Critical'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'High' THEN 'P2 - High'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Medium' THEN 'P3 - Medium'
         ELSE 'P4 - Low'
      END AS Priority,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` AS C3,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status_Reason` AS C4,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C5,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Service Type` AS C6,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C7,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`ServiceCI` AS C8,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` IS NULL THEN '(no assignee)'
         ELSE `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` + ' - ' + `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee`
      END AS C22,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` AS C11,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Organization` AS C12,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Company` AS C13,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date` AS C14,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submitter` AS C15,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Last Resolved Date` AS C16,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Closed Date` AS C17,
      DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C24,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 5
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C25,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 15
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C26,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C27
   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
   WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
LIMIT 100000

SELECT DISTINCT
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Incident Number` AS `Incident Number`,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Description` AS C2,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Critical' THEN 'P1 - Critical'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'High' THEN 'P2 - High'
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Medium' THEN 'P3 - Medium'
         ELSE 'P4 - Low'
      END AS Priority,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` AS C3,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status_Reason` AS C4,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C5,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Service Type` AS C6,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Reported Source` AS C7,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`ServiceCI` AS C8,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` IS NULL THEN '(no assignee)'
         ELSE `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee Login ID` + ' - ' + `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assignee`
      END AS C22,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` AS C11,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Organization` AS C12,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Support Company` AS C13,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date` AS C14,

      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Closed Date` AS C17,
      DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE

         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C24,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 5
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C25,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 15
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C26,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C27
   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
   WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
LIMIT 100000

SELECT DISTINCT
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Incident Number` AS `Incident Number`,
      `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Description` AS C2,
      CASE
         WHEN `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority` = 'Critical' THEN 'P1 - Critical'

      DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1

   FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
   WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))
LIMIT 100000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS C2,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS C3
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority`,
        CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
    COUNT( `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Incident Number`) as Inccount
   
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` AS `HPD:HELP DESK`
   WHERE (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`HPD:HELP DESK`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled'))

GROUP BY 
   `HPD:HELP DESK`.`Priority`,
    Aging
LIMIT 100000

Select Age, Priority, Count(*) Cnt from (
SELECT
(CASE
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) >= 0 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 7 THEN '<=7 Days'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 7 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 14 THEN '> 7 days and <= 14 days'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 14 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '> 14 Days and <= 30 days'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN '> 30 Days'
END) AS Age, Priority
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
 (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
)) SQL1
group by Age, Priority
order by Priority

list.label: Service
list.name: Service
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` FROM `HPD:Help Desk` WHERE `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` IS NOT NULL  and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled') LIMIT 1000"}

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `HPD:Help Desk`.`Impact` FROM `HPD:Help Desk` LIMIT 1000"}
list.label: Impact
list.name: Impact
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `HPD:Help Desk`.`Impact` FROM `HPD:Help Desk` LIMIT 1000"}
